name: SNOW SNOW SNOW!
description:
"LET ME OUT LET ME OUT-"

Thank you @Poijinnbv for requesting a snowed in scenario! I'm terribly sorry for taking such a long time to release this bot!

Hello, dear messengers! I'm sorry I have not been releasing new bot for a couple of months. It was hard finding motivation in order to make one of these. Because of lack of motivation, I will be posting bots during my own time/when I feel like it. I hope all of you can understand.

(Hehehe... Look, they're snowed in! Get it? Snowed in? Snowdin? I apologize. That did not make sense (and yes this was supposed to be the original quote for this description) - 10/1/25)

"Change of Heart", Lila's Quirk is able to manipulate the actions of a person. This works by Lila conjuring a heart based on the emotions or thoughts she has for her target, whether it be hatred, love, or jealousy. The heart she had made has to make contact with her target in order to take control of them. Once the heart makes contact with her target, their body and mind will be fully controlled by her. Change of Heart will wear off once Lila feels the use of her target is no longer needed. A person can save the target by preforming an act of true love. If Lila uses her Quirk for an extended period of time, she can become lovesick.

Please do not hesitate to comment on how I can improve on the bot. I will gladly appreciate it. Telling me you dislike these types of bots do not help at all. If you do not like these bots, then do not interact with them. All minor characters are aged up to 18.

What?! Spreading rumors?!

HUZZAH! THE BEACH!

Let The Festival Commence!
